description_long: This is a retro-style freestanding oven and stove unit, predominantly finished in a pastel blue color with black trim accents. The front features a large oven door with a prominent horizontal handle and a metallic 'Big Chill' logo, as well as a control panel with five round knobs above the door. The cooktop has four gas burners, each with a black grate, and the back panel rises to house the control knobs. The sides are plain and smooth, matching the blue finish, while the rear is mostly flat with minimal detailing. The oven's overall design is robust and boxy, with a slightly elevated base and a classic, vintage aesthetic.
description: A pastel blue, retro-style oven with four gas burners, black trim, and a prominent front handle and logo. Features a raised control panel with five round knobs and a robust, boxy build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the oven door with a large handle, 'Big Chill' logo, five control knobs, and all four burners clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the smooth blue panel, the side profile of the handle, and the depth of the cooktop and control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, featureless back panel with the oven's base and the back of the raised control panel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the handle's side profile and the oven's overall depth and structure.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is raised above the cooktop and features five evenly spaced, round knobs arranged in a horizontal row. Each knob is black with a metallic accent, and there are no visible digital displays or touchscreens. The panel is integrated into the backguard, which is slightly angled for ergonomic access. No additional labeling or display elements are visible.
attribute_door_handle_type: The oven door handle is a thick, horizontal bar mounted across the upper portion of the door. It is protruding, metallic in appearance, and features a black grip section for ergonomic handling. The handle is robust and visually prominent, designed for easy pulling.
attribute_brand_logo: Big Chill logo is visible on the lower center of the oven door in a metallic script style.
